claim_boundary: this report is a benchmark-bound comparison across matched workloads. It keeps internal exact-compute, cpu-reference, external sandbox, and hybrid-only honest postures explicit instead of collapsing route rankings into product or authority claims
summary: Delegation benchmark report covers 6 matched cases with wins internal=2, cpu_reference=2, external_sandbox=1, hybrid=1, and evidence completeness internal/cpu/external = 8116/10000/9325 bps.
